title: Wedding Invitation Design
desc: We are seeking a talented designer to create a beautiful wedding invitation for our special day. The invitation should be elegant, modern, and reflect our personal style. The design should include all necessary details such as date, time, location, and dress code. We are open to suggestions and ideas to make it truly unique and memorable.

title: Wedding Photo Culling and Editing
desc: Seeking a skilled freelancer to cull and edit 1,500 wedding photos. Responsibilities include selecting the best shots, enhancing colors, and ensuring consistent lighting. Deliverables include a curated gallery and edited images in JPEG format. Experience with wedding photography is essential.

title: Wedding Photo Editor Needed
desc: I am seeking a skilled photo editor to enhance the photos from my upcoming wedding. The ideal candidate will have experience in wedding photo editing and be able to deliver high-quality results. The project involves editing a collection of photos to ensure they are visually appealing and ready for sharing. The deadline for this project is within the next 2 months.

title: Wedding Postcard
desc: Hello, I would like to design a postcard for my wedding. The inspo would be similar to the attached, in terms of venue, some greenery and our names. The color palette would be lime green, white and pastel blue. Is this something you'd be able to do and how much would the digital design cost approx? Thanks Mira

title: Wedding Stationery Design
desc: I am seeking a creative designer to help me design my wedding stationery using Canva. The project involves illustrating and animating the designs to match my specific style. The ideal candidate should have experience in print design and be able to bring my vision to life. If you have a passion for wedding stationery and a knack for animation, I would love to hear from you!

title: Wedding Template Designer — Long-Term Work Inside Our Online Editor
desc: About Us: WeddingTemplates.com is a digital wedding stationery brand offering customizable, downloadable templates for DIY brides. Couples customize our designs in our free browser-based editor, then download and print at home (or share via link, in the case of online invites). We've built a catalog of 80+ templates across three categories and are now expanding. We need a talented designer who can build beautiful, on-brand templates directly inside our editor. What You'll Design: You'll create wedding templates across three product categories: 1. Invitations & Stationery — invitation suites, save-the-dates, RSVP cards, details cards, thank-you cards 2. Ceremony & Reception Essentials — menus, programs, place cards, table numbers, seating charts, signage, favor tags 3. Online Wedding Invitations — mobile-first digital invites designed for sharing via link, text, or email Each template line needs to be delivered across 5 distinct aesthetic styles: Minimalist, Floral, Boho, Classic, and Rustic. Range matters — you should be able to credibly deliver all five without them feeling like the same designer's hand. Where You'll Work — Important: All design work happens inside our proprietary browser-based editor. You won't be sending us PSD or AI files. You'll build templates natively in o

title: Wedding favor logo
desc: Looking for someone to design a label for our wedding favors. I'll be printing them on sticker paper and can get the measurements of what is needed. I'll provide a picture of our invitations so it can be referenced. Our colors are pastels and I'm just looking for something simple with some flowers.

title: Wedding photo culling + editing in Lightroom
desc: Hello! I’m an established wedding photographer currently looking for an experienced wedding photo editor to join my team on a long-term basis as I am at capacity! (see example of my work attached) I shoot around 30-40 weddings per year and am looking for someone with a strong eye for detail, experience in Lightroom skills, and preferably experience specifically within wedding photography editing + culling My workflow: • I photograph the wedding day • I run the full gallery through Aftershoot AI using my editing profile • I create sneak peeks (typically 80–150 images in both colour and black & white) • I send you the full Lightroom catalogue for culling + final editing What I’m looking for from you: • Cull the gallery manually (not with AI, human eye only), selecting the strongest images with careful attention to blinking, facial expressions, storytelling moments, composition, and artistic choices • Refine and finesse the edits across the gallery to ensure consistency with the sneak peeks, including exposure, white balance, cropping, straightening, some spot removal and noise reduction adjustments where needed • Create black & white versions for approximately 20% of the final gallery using my preset • Return the completed Lightroom catalogue ready for client delivery The gallery w

title: Engaging Motion Graphics for Schugle
desc: Schugle (pronounced "shoe" + the "gle" from "Google") is a German web product that helps teachers create, formulate, structure and revise Foerderplaene (individual pupil support plans) with AI — while protecting sensitive pupil data by replacing real names with anonymised placeholders before anything reaches the AI. The current website is factual and dry; the client wants a coherent visual campaign that makes the idea attractive, memorable and emotionally clear while staying calm, credible, professional and suitable for schools. The mandated narrative arc is "Messy notes -> structured thoughts -> protected placeholders -> AI-assisted formulation -> clear Foerderplan," with the tilted Schugle "g" icon as a recurring motif. The client explicitly forbids generic education clichés (happy teachers, smiling children, chalkboards, graduation caps, cartoon kids, generic "school app" imagery). Produce THREE related videos that read as one campaign: (1) a 10-second clip that also works as a SILENT website hero/background loop (must read with no voiceover and be visually calm), (2) a 30-second promotional/social/reel version, and (3) a 2-minute explainer that reuses material from the first two. German on-screen text is required and MUST remain editable — the client may swap German copy or a

title: Cinematic Tribute Video for Guru Vandana cum Birthday Event (Shri Anil Tolia Ji, 250 guests)
desc: Context: A family is organizing a "Guru Vandana" (guru-reverence) cum birthday celebration for Shri Anil Tolia Ji, to be attended by roughly 250 friends, family members, children, and guests. The centerpiece of the function is an emotional life-journey tribute video projected on a large LED screen/projector during the event. The piece must feel emotional but positive, respectful and heartwarming, inspirational, elegant and premium — and must AVOID loud flashy editing, overly dramatic effects, fast social-media-style cutting, and distracting animations. The desired register is "cinematic family tribute / elegant slideshow-documentary," with smooth transitions, slow zoom/pan, and tasteful typography. The ask: Using the supplied raw materials — chronological photo sets (childhood, college & friendship, career, marriage & family, recent, and Guru-Vandana moments), several raw home/event video clips, and a noisy live on-stage tribute speech recorded at rehearsal — produce a 5-8 minute Full-HD (1920×1080, MP4) tribute that follows the client's exact 8-section flow: (1) Opening Tribute, (2) Childhood Journey, (3) College & Friendship Days, (4) Career & Achievements, (5) Family Journey, (6) Guru Vandana Section, (7) Birthday Celebration, (8) Closing Message. The agent must mine the raw c

title: Create Professional Shopify App Store Demo Video — Avatar Intro + Website/App Walkthrough
desc: DisputeDesk is a Shopify app that helps ecommerce merchants manage chargebacks and assemble structured dispute evidence. The client is preparing their Shopify App Store listing and wants to replace a rough, amateur screen recording with a polished product-introduction film. They have provided a long raw screen-capture walkthrough of the app, a separately recorded male business-avatar intro clip, a capture of the marketing homepage, a scratch voiceover take recorded in a non-treated room, a brand kit (logo, colors, fonts), and a licensed corporate music stem. The film must open with the professional, calm, trustworthy avatar presenter introducing the chargeback problem and the product in a B2B-SaaS register, then transition smoothly into the website/homepage section, then into a guided app walkthrough with professional zooms, callouts, UI highlights, clean text overlays, and smooth transitions — guided by the voiceover, never feeling like someone randomly clicking around.\n\nThe exact, gradeable constraints from the client: the final master must be 1600 × 900 pixels, 16:9, exported as MP4; it must NOT crop important parts of the website or app UI; on-screen text must be readable; and the audio must be clean and balanced throughout (no room noise, no awkward pauses, consistent loud

title: Brand Identity & Marketing Asset Package for Growing PC Company
desc: Tech World PC is a growing custom-computer company (custom gaming PCs, workstations, refurbished systems, computer repair, upgrades and components) that currently sells primarily through eBay and other online marketplaces and wants a professional, consistent brand identity that scales with the business. They have completed the concept phase and selected a logo DIRECTION — a geometric hexagon icon with an integrated 'TW' monogram, clean corporate styling, strong readability at small sizes — but the only artifact they have is rough AI-generated concept artwork from brainstorming. They are explicit that they do NOT want a blind trace of the AI image: they want the concept recovered into clean professional vector form. (Note: the connector set provides image_vectorize for raster->clean-SVG recovery but no bespoke vector path-editing tool; this spec therefore treats the cleaned vectorize output as the connector-feasible 'rebuilt vector' and notes that any further hand path-refinement is an out-of-connector source-file step, so the anti-trace requirement is graded against a clean, non-garbage vector rather than against path editing no tool can do.) The icon must function independently from the wordmark so it can live in watermarks, social profile pictures, product photos, stickers and

title: Brand Identity + Packaging Designer for Premium Men's Skincare/Grooming Brand
desc: BARDE Grooming (working name, shared only with the awarded freelancer) is launching a premium men's grooming/skincare brand. The flagship is a 50ml post-shave / post-haircut roll-on serum aimed at men prone to razor bumps, ingrown hairs, irritation, and dark marks around the neck and beard line. The brand must read premium, masculine, modern, barber-led and performance-focused — built for both DTC ecommerce and barbershop retail — and must NOT look generic, overly clinical, feminine, or like a cheap private-label product. Visual direction: matte black / deep charcoal packaging with cream, white, silver, or deep-red accents; a minimal-but-bold layout; a strong wordmark; and a social-media-friendly, lifestyle-driven feel (reference point for boldness only, not to copy: 'Sleep or Die').\n\nYou are hired for the Full Brand Package. Deliver: a logo/wordmark, color palette, typography system, and a basic brand style guide; the 50ml roll-on sleeve/label design; an outer product box design; a patch pouch design; a routine/instruction card; product mockups and social assets; and print-ready files with dielines plus editable source files. Enriched for this benchmark into a long-horizon pipeline, the engagement also requires: (a) a Firefly moodboard that locks the brand world from the suppl

title: B2B Industrial Catalog Designer — Poultry Equipment Pilot + Full Catalog Rollout
desc: TSI Poultry is a multi-branch industrial and poultry-equipment distributor (Louisiana, Oklahoma, Tennessee) building a new catalog for its poultry division. The engagement is two-phase, and this task covers Phase 1, the pilot: the Winching & Suspension Systems catalog — roughly 10-12 pages covering ~75 SKUs in a single product category. The explicit point of Phase 1 is not just a pretty PDF; it is to lock in the design system, typography, and a reusable template that Phase 2 (the full multi-category poultry catalog) will scale from. The client provides everything needed: a rough mockup ('a direction we like, not a brief — genuinely open to your professional take'), a price list with every SKU, description, and cross-reference part number to industry-standard equivalents, a full set of product photography shot in-house on white background (no stock, no reshoots), and brand assets (TSI Poultry logo and color palette). The desired aesthetic is 'industrial precision' — technical-documentation restraint, premium without being precious — for an audience of purchasing managers, integrators, and farm operators who care about specs and part numbers more than decoration but who respect a serious, well-built reference document.\n\nThe deliverables are fixed and specific: a print-ready PDF (

title: Bold Monreale Perfume Photography
desc: Monreale is launching a new unisex fragrance line and needs a campaign image set that feels "bold, modern and instantly appealing to a younger, unisex crowd," built around contrast-heavy lighting, saturated color accents, and confident product placement (per the attached inspiration board and the five flagged reference frames). The work splits into two parts exactly as the client states: (1) clean PRODUCT imagery that shows every faceted edge of the faceted-glass bottle, and (2) LIFESTYLE frames that place the scent in an energetic, real-world context. You are given a single clean studio capture of the Monreale bottle on a plain sweep, a concatenated inspiration/mood sheet (the five flagged references), a brand sheet PDF with the palette, lighting notes and required file types, and a hand model/lifestyle plate with an empty bottle-sized gap. You must license a rights-cleared studio backdrop/prop set from Adobe Stock (standard license, unlimited global use), use image_generative_expand to extend the single bottle capture into a wide 16:9 hero canvas and a vertical 9:16 story canvas (blending toward the licensed backdrop ground), and build the lifestyle frame by extracting the bottle with image_remove_background and compositing it into the empty hand gap with a local layout/composi

title: Refine Existing Logo into Elegant Spiritual Brand Identity
desc: Gateway Spiritualism is a spiritual/philosophical project (podcasting, writing, Substack articles, YouTube videos and public-facing content) centered on inner change, emotional honesty, and awakening from self-judgment and endless self-improvement. The client already has an existing logo/artwork concept (attached) but it reads as symbolic cover art, not a true brand identity. They explicitly do NOT want a new concept from scratch and do NOT want any piece of the original reused verbatim — instead, refine and distill the existing imagery into a professional, elegant, timeless logo and brand symbol that works cleanly across Substack, podcast profiles, YouTube, business cards, social media, and website branding. The core symbolism to PRESERVE is: gateway/doorway (must remain central), awakening, awareness/perception, transformation, and inner passage/transition. The eye-as-awareness idea may be used only if abstract, elegant, subtle and integrated into the gateway — never a literal/realistic eye, and never anything occult, psychedelic, conspiracy-oriented, fantasy/New-Age cliché, or 'all-seeing-eye.' The brand must feel thoughtful, emotionally intelligent, spiritually reflective, calm, elegant, minimalist, timeless, and quietly profound — and must NOT feel loud, flashy, corporate, '

title: Premium Medical Device Brochure Design - RADIVA Shockwave Therapy System (8-page digital + press)
desc: Biotech - a manufacturer with 32 years in rehabilitation equipment - is launching RADIVA, a next-generation Solid-State Radial Pressure Wave Therapy (RPWT) system, and needs a premium ~8-page product brochure that positions it against leading medical-device brands (Zimmer, Storz Medical, BTL, Chattanooga). This is explicitly NOT a generic product catalog: the brochure must communicate Innovation, Intelligence, Clinical Confidence and Premium Technology, with a clean, modern, minimal, technology-driven European medical-device aesthetic. RADIVA's selling points must be surfaced as structured spec/feature content: Solid-State Electromagnetic Technology, Soft Shock Technology (patient comfort), the BIOS (Biotech Operating System) running an RTOS on a quad-core 64-bit ARM processor, a 10-inch capacitive touchscreen, a built-in clinical protocol library with user-created and QuickLink protocols, and real-time parameter adjustment during treatment.\n\nThe brochure has a fixed 8-page running order: (1) Cover, (2) RPWT Overview, (3) Solid-State Technology, (4) Soft Shock Technology, (5) BIOS Software Platform, (6) Intelligent Clinical Workflow, (7) Real-Time Treatment Control, (8) Closing / Company Experience. The client PROVIDES finished product photography (a clean studio device hero),

title: Canva Wedding Website Template Designer — Full Etsy Listing Package (Old Money Style)
desc: A solo Etsy seller is launching a digital-products shop selling 'Save the Date' wedding-website template kits, and needs a complete, sellable listing package for the first SKU in an 'Old Money / Luxury Wedding' style. The fixed palette is dark burgundy, cream/ivory, and gold accents with lace-detail textures; the overall feel must read high-end and editorial, never basic or generic. The kit centers on a 7-page wedding-website template (Hero/Monogram with couple names + wedding date; Envelope Reveal; Save the Date; Wedding Details with venue/time/dress code; Our Story with photo + timeline; RSVP form; live Countdown Timer) that buyers receive as an editable Canva share link and that must work on mobile. The seller has nine more listings ready to assign if the first is strong, so consistency and a reusable, personalizable system matter more than one-off art.\n\nThe agent is given the seller's raw source assets - a couple engagement portrait, a hand-drawn gold monogram crest, a guest/RSVP CSV, a screen recording of the template scrolling through all pages (regenerated to >=30s of usable scroll), and a short raw voiceover clip - and must produce the full listing package faithful to the real brief, using EVERY step within real connector capability and with each step execution-mode tag

title: 2-Minute Arabic Algebra Explainer
desc:
Context: A client is commissioning a concise, two-minute educational video that teaches linear (one-variable) equations in clear, age-appropriate Arabic delivered with a genuine GCC (Gulf) accent. The piece is explicitly a MIXED format: short live-action segments featuring a boy aged 12–15, blended seamlessly with animated graphics that illustrate the algebra steps. The client will supply curriculum references; the freelancer handles scriptwriting, voice-over, casting/stock for the boy, animation, editing, and final mastering. The visual style must stay vibrant and engaging without distracting from the math — dynamic call-outs and simple motion graphics that walk a viewer through solving one basic linear equation and checking the answer.

The exact ask: deliver a finished explainer built on an Adobe Express animated lesson-frame template. Use the supplied reference lecture to derive the precise solving sequence (problem → isolate the variable → divide by the coefficient → state x → substitute and check). Produce four animated scenes (one per solve beat) carrying Arabic equation/step copy, interweave them IN A FIXED PEDAGOGICAL ORDER with the live-action boy footage into a single cut, lay the polished Arabic narration over the picture, and master to spec.

title: Luxury Packaging Designer — Hyperrealistic Beauty Subscription Box
desc: A new multi-brand beauty subscription service is launching and needs the physical packaging for its flagship box - the box that ships in every delivery and showcases several partner brands at once. The client's North Star is Gucci: clean, confident, impeccably finished, luxurious without trying too hard. They want a refined premium exterior with beautiful proportions and an impeccable finish; elevated soft-touch modern materials (they explicitly dislike embossing and hot-foil stamping - lean away from that look); a thoughtful interior structure whose inserts and dividers hold each brand's product securely and present them with room to breathe rather than crowded; considered details (a satisfying closure, a ribbon pull, a branded seal, a thoughtful card); and a premium, satisfying opening reveal. Restraint over ornamentation throughout. The client supplies their vision/reference imagery and expects the designer to elevate that direction into something original and distinctly their own.\n\nThe engagement is a collaborative two-phase process. Phase 1 (Concepts): at least three distinct design directions presented as concept boards/mockups, each a different take on structure, materials, finishes, interior arrangement, closure and opening, with a short walkthrough of the thinking.
